title: aolu Resourcepack Collection
description: all of my Datapack-Specific Resourcepacks put together in one pack
body:
### aolu Resource Pack Collection
This Resource Pack holds all of my custom textures/models for all my datapacks in one place for ease of use
## Featured Packs:
- [Staffs & Tomes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/staffs-tomes)
- [Canno-Pikes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/canno-pikes)
- [Repeater Crossbow](https://modrinth.com/datapack/repeater-crossbow)
- [Rapiers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aolu_rapiers)
